content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.69% with VIX +3.67% to 17.23 signals risk-off underneath strong individual earnings prints. Bank Nifty -1.14% and Energy -1.05% show breadth deteriorating, but stock-specific Q4 winners (COFORGE, POLYCAB, LUPIN, WOCKPHARMA, SRF, BHARATFORG, PIDILITIND, MARICO) running hard. Manage book defensively — many holdings are at or near targets after the post-results gap-up moves; lock gains via trailed SLs.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+10.5% winner, CMP 1087, intraday rolled off 1089.50 high to 1085. Current SL 1066.24 already locks ~8.5% gain. Keeping near 1068 preserves 1.7% trail-gap below CMP (Rule 12c). Target 1135 still ~4.4% away near 52w-high zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -0.6% within tolerance. VIX rising supports thesis. SL 121 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "new_target": 845.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (PAT +14%, revenue +22%), all-time-high zone. CMP 827.60 fading from 836 high. Tightening SL to 818 (1.2% below CMP, just above entry 820) — locks breakeven. Trim target to 845 (just below recent ATH 836.50 + buffer); R:R from current ~1.8."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+8.2% winner on Q4 blowout. Current SL 1338.68 already at +6.3% gain locked, 1.6% below CMP 1360 — appropriate trail-gap, no further tightening per Rule 12c (don't choke a runner). Trim target slightly to 1420 (closer to 20-DMA top BB) so partial exit triggers sooner. No-op skipped — target change is meaningful."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.2% with volatile +5.4% session high then fade to flat. Defense overheated valuations (P/E 42, P/B 15) — SL 2960 sits ~3.6% below CMP 3073, appropriate for Defense volatility. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+4% winner. Current stored SL 832 sits only 1.0% below CMP 840 — essentially flush; one normal downtick stops out. LOOSEN to 825 — wait, Rule says SL can only be TIGHTENED for longs. Cannot lower from 832 to 825. RETRACTING: keep SL 832, but that's at the 1% trail-gap floor. Actually 832 vs CMP 840 = 0.95% gap, BELOW 1% floor (Rule 12c failure mode). Cannot loosen. Switch to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat (+37% PAT), -0.7% intraday wobble well within 3% SL absorption. Thesis intact, no exit per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 24,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results blockbuster (PAT +87.5%, EBITDA margin 33.6%) but stock GAPPED UP to 2475 then SOLD OFF to 2366 — classic 'sell on news' fade with -4.4% intraday range. CMP 2366 sits at SL 2370 — SL effectively triggered. NEW POST-ENTRY information: today's tape demonstrably rejected the earnings beat (volume 1.3x absorbed selling). Per Rule 17, this qualifies as new post-entry fact. Exit MARKET."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +317% PAT YoY. -0.8% intraday fade after gap-up. SL 1580 (2.4% below CMP 1610) intact. Volume 11.8x is structural breakout — give it room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2745.00,
      "new_target": 2920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +11%, FY26 PAT +47% — strong. CMP 2784 essentially flat to entry 2785. Tightening SL marginally from 2740 to 2745 — wait, this is a 0.18% adjustment, below the 0.5% micro-adjust floor (Rule 12). Withdrawing — switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Record Q4, ATH zone. +0.2% just entered. SL 9000 (1.4% below CMP 9127) intact. Need room to develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 mixed (revenue +17.5% but PAT -17% on exceptional items), Defense order book Rs 10,961 Cr strong. Stock ran to 2044 then faded to 2002. SL 1955 (-2.3%) intact. NA Class 8 truck collapse is real FY27 risk — not adding."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Per Rule 13, active SFIO criminal probe under Section 212, Rs 2,600 Cr derivatives fraud, Rs 173 Cr microfinance fraud, Rs 674 Cr wrongly booked interest. Governance overhang dominates technical breakout. Same failure mode as Day-5 INDUSINDBK round-trip. NO ENTRY regardless of Q4 turnaround.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ASIANPAINT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "BEARISH research rating (-0.12 modifier). May 29 Q4 board meeting is binary catalyst but >3 sessions out. Market share erosion to Birla Opus, antitrust probe, P/E 66 — risk-reward unattractive even at +6.6% pop.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "reasoning": "Stale MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 placed 56 hours ago (3360m). Order should not survive across sessions; CANCEL to clean up book."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.00,
      "reasoning": "Locking in +8.5% gain at 1068, 1.7% below CMP — proper trail-gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, VIX rising favorable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 818.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven-ish; CMP 827 vs entry 820, lock gains after Q4 ATH."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1338.68 already 1.6% below CMP, +6.3% locked — proper trail-gap, don't choke runner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.2%, choppy. Defense volatility justifies current 3.6% SL distance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 832 is tight (0.95% below CMP) but cannot loosen per rules. Accept the risk; if stopped, +3.2% locked."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +37%, intact thesis, normal intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sell-on-news despite blockbuster Q4. CMP at SL trigger zone with bearish intraday tape."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Structural breakout on 11.8x volume, give room to develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat to entry. SL 2740 (-1.6%) appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, ATH. SL 9000 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1955 intact. Faded from intraday high but within tolerance."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewed BULLISH-rated candidates from Stock 6-13 that I do not already hold: ASIANPAINT (BEARISH, governance overhang on Birla Opus), INDUSINDBK (BEARISH, governance Rule 13). PERSISTENT (NEUTRAL +0.02, sub +0.05 modifier) — not a qualifying admit candidate. THERMAX, DABUR, BAJAJ-AUTO, FINCABLES, GABRIEL, TATATECH, ABCAPITAL, NH, APOLLOTYRE, KPIL, RAMCOCEM, LAURUSLABS — all up sharply already; chasing extended +5-15% moves at intraday close gives poor R:R. None qualify per Rule 16 floor. Per Rule 18 explicit reject log: each of these qualifying gappers fails the entry test because the move has already happened and the SL needed to absorb post-gap volatility produces sub-1.5 R:R at current price levels. Awaiting pullbacks for fresh re-entries.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 58% deployed against 80% soft target — under-deployed but VIX +3.67% session and broad-index breadth weak counsel against admitting fresh longs into post-results gap-ups. The 12-name book is heavy with Q4-results positions; today's job is locking gains on winners (PNBHOUSING, MARICO trail-SL) and exiting the failed earnings reaction (LUPIN sell-on-news at SL trigger). Cumulative P&L still only +1.01% / 19 sessions — focus on quality of entry, not quantity. Cleaning up stale 56-hour HFCL pending order."
}
